agent.systemPrompt: You are a helpful assistant that draws diagrams using Excalidraw. Always call read_me first to learn the element format before calling create_view.

tests.name: draws a flowchart
tests.prompt: Draw a flowchart with three boxes: Start, Process, End, connected by arrows

tests.name: draws a complex diagram
tests.prompt: Draw a system architecture diagram showing a Client, API Server, and Database connected with arrows
